reasoning: A better enables a correct answer because it includes a result directly matching the queried event: the France24 item about one of the largest attacks on Kyiv, plus CNN analysis explicitly referring to the Thursday July 2 strike and noting 77 missiles including 28 ballistic missiles. Although A contains conflicting casualty numbers and an irrelevant later July 6 AP-style result at the top, it still more clearly identifies the specific massive Kyiv attack referenced in the question. B is more muddled: its top result is the wrong later attack, it mixes in unrelated follow-on coverage, and the closest matching result gives an outdated 13-death count rather than the 21-killed casualty update in the query/anchor.
